domains.name: gaming
domains.description: Real-time interactive 3D graphics workloads — frame-rate-bound game engines on raster and ray-tracing pipelines.

domains.name: office & productivity
domains.description: Productivity, browsing, email and document workflows — latency-sensitive but rarely throughput-bound.

domains.name: software development
domains.description: Code editing, compilation, version control and developer tooling — heavy on integer throughput, file I/O and many small reads.

domains.name: graphics & photo editing
domains.description: Raster image editing and photo post-production — large 2D buffers, GPU-accelerated filters and many short interactive operations.

domains.name: video editing & encoding
domains.description: Video editing, color grading and encoding — sustained sequential I/O paired with heavy hardware-accelerated encode/decode pipelines.

domains.name: 3d rendering & animation
domains.description: Offline 3D content production — modeling, animation and ray-traced rendering workloads dominated by GPU and CPU FP throughput.

domains.name: audio production & dsp
domains.description: DAW work, mixing, software instruments and real-time DSP — latency-critical, single-thread-bound and memory-latency-sensitive.

domains.name: cad & engineering simulation
domains.description: CAD modeling and engineering simulation — FP64-heavy solvers, large-mesh visualization and long-running compute jobs.

domains.name: scientific computing & hpc
domains.description: Numerical simulation, HPC and scientific compute — FP64 and large-bandwidth memory access dominate.

domains.name: ai / ml training
domains.description: Model training workloads — sustained matmul throughput on GPU/accelerator, large activations in VRAM, high host-bandwidth feeders.

domains.name: ai inference (llm & diffusion)
domains.description: Local LLM and diffusion inference — memory-bandwidth-bound token generation and compute-bound denoising loops.

domains.name: data science & analytics
domains.description: Tabular analytics, dataframe operations, query engines — memory-bandwidth-bound aggregation over wide datasets.

domains.name: server & virtualization
domains.description: Multi-tenant workloads, container/VM density, sustained background throughput across many concurrent processes.
